name: Intention Hint
description: Pre-scans user intent before replies and injects routing hints via before_prompt_build hook.

model.label: Scanner Model
model.help: Lightweight model for the intention scanner (e.g. google/gemini-3-flash). Leave empty to use the agent's default model.

timeoutMs.label: Scanner Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Budget in milliseconds for the intention scanner sub-agent.

agents.description: Agent IDs eligible for intention scanning.

intentDeny.description: Per-agent deny-list for intent IDs injected into the intention classifier. Object keys are agent IDs or wildcard patterns; values are arrays of intent ID or wildcard patterns.

model.description: Lightweight model for the intention scanner (e.g. google/gemini-3-flash). If null, falls back to the agent's default model.

modelFallback.description: Fallback model when config.model cannot be resolved.

timeoutMs.description: Budget in milliseconds for the intention scanner sub-agent.

queryMode.description: Context sent to scanner: latest message only, recent turns, or full history.

recentUserTurns.description: Number of recent user turns to include when queryMode is 'recent'.

recentAssistantTurns.description: Number of recent assistant turns to include when queryMode is 'recent'.

recentUserChars.description: Max characters per recent user turn when queryMode is 'recent'.

recentAssistantChars.description: Max characters per recent assistant turn when queryMode is 'recent'.

intentsDir.description: Directory containing dynamic intent definitions (.md files with YAML frontmatter).

intentsHotReload.description: Automatically reload intent definitions from intentsDir when changed.

intentsHotReloadIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds for checking intent definition changes.

complexityPrompts.description: Custom prompts for each complexity level.

low.description: Custom prompt for low-complexity tasks (simple, quick questions).

medium.description: Custom prompt for medium-complexity tasks (standard multi-step work).

high.description: Custom prompt for high-complexity tasks (complex multi-file changes, architecture decisions).

enabled.description: Enable self-evolution features for the plugin.

reviewModel.description: Model for the review subagent (e.g. claude/claude-sonnet-4-20250514). If null, uses the default model.

reviewThinkingLevel.description: OpenClaw thinking level for the review subagent.

reviewTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the review subagent.

satisfactionCheckInterval.description: LLM satisfaction check interval in turns.

toolCallCountThreshold.description: Non-LLM: tool call count threshold for skill_candidate trigger.

skillsUsedThreshold.description: Non-LLM: used skills size threshold for skill_candidate trigger (0 means any skill triggers).

failureCountThreshold.description: Non-LLM: tool failure count threshold for process_gap trigger.

weakIntentConfidenceThreshold.description: Non-LLM: confidence threshold for weak_intent trigger (0.0-1.0).
